title: GraphSentry Certificate
description: A certificate is a deterministic predicate evaluated from logged evidence, emitted alongside an artifact by each DAG node. Certificates make implicit interface assumptions explicit and auditable. Based on GraphSentry (Li et al., 2026).

node_id.description: The DAG node that emitted this certificate

predicate_name.description: Name of the deterministic predicate that was evaluated

result.description: Whether the predicate passed. Same evidence always produces the same result.

evidence.description: The logged evidence used to evaluate the predicate. All evidence_keys from the certificate spec must be present.

artifact_hash.description: SHA-256 of the artifact this certificate accompanies. Binds the certificate to a specific output.

upstream_certificates.description: Summary of upstream certificates this node depended on

duration_ms.description: Time taken to produce the artifact

error.description: Error message if the node failed before predicate evaluation

execution_context.description: Runtime context logged during node execution

dag_plan_ref.description: Path or URI to the DAG plan this certificate was produced under
